title: Define the M2 work logistics scenario contract
summary: Specify the executable M2 work/logistics vertical-slice scenario, including 20 actors hauling/building, 100 versioned path requests, fixture bounds, invariants, structured reasons and non-goals.
acceptance: Scenario contract defines map bounds actors item sources storage destinations build/order targets command stream seeds tick horizons and expected terminal state
Scenario explicitly targets 20 actors hauling/building plus 100 path requests under versioned invalidation
Invariants cover reservation leaks stale work offers negative resources queue growth material conservation hash divergence and structured reason traces
Contract preserves Worker/headless authority sim-core purity indexed bounded work selection serializable jobs save/replay and Worker parity expectations
Contract explicitly excludes broad economy town-life anomaly combat platform save UI content expansion balance production and M3

history.details: Created by WM-0032 M2 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Defined m2.work_logistics.lantern_yard.v1 scenario contract with 20 actors, 100 versioned path requests, terminal state, invariants, failure variants, authority guardrails and non-goals; required checks pass.

verified: No blocking findings: scenario contract covers required fixture bounds, actors, sources, destinations, build/order targets, command stream, seeds, horizons, terminal state, 20 actors plus 100 versioned path probes, invariants, authority guardrails and non-goals; required checks pass locally.

Verified M2 scenario contract integrated on task branch; reviewer approved; integration gates passed: validate-handoff 561 files/43 tasks/10 roles, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.

objective: Produce the executable M2 scenario contract before implementation starts.
forbiddenPaths: M3 task creation or implementation claims
benchmarkImpact: Defines benchmark dimensions and invariant names only; no benchmark implementation or baseline change.
reviewRouting: Owner completes with taskctl to reviewer; reviewer verifies the contract before project-director integration can promote WM-0034.
rollbackModel: Revert the scenario docs, task packet and report. No runtime state or compatibility promise exists.
ownerGate: Do not claim implementation tasks from this scenario task
Report all non-goals and any unresolved scenario assumptions
Run every required check before taskctl complete

sparkEligibility.reason: Scenario/specification design and vertical-slice invariant definition are not suitable for Spark.

review.summary: No blocking findings: scenario contract covers required fixture bounds, actors, sources, destinations, build/order targets, command stream, seeds, horizons, terminal state, 20 actors plus 100 versioned path probes, invariants, authority guardrails and non-goals; required checks pass locally.

integration.summary: Verified M2 scenario contract integrated on task branch; reviewer approved; integration gates passed: validate-handoff 561 files/43 tasks/10 roles, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.
